title: hieracium longifolium subsp. autophyes
intro: Hieracium longifolium subsp. autophyes, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to certain regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium longifolium subsp. autophyes include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Hieracium longifolium subsp. autophyes can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
